case_title: LUCY ADACHI et al VS. TERUKO FURUTA et al

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2006 Off Calendar

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Quieting Title of Real Property Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Gordon Yamamoto, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lucy Adachi ind. and as trustee of the Lucy Adachi 1997 Trust.
Plaintiff's Witness: Lucy Adachi, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Teruko Furuta fka Teruko Adachi, and All Persons claiming any interest in or lien upon the Real Property.
See scanned doc. for details of the subject property, fully describe in the Judgment signed in open court.
